/// @generated
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: BinarySearch
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class fastdata final {

    static constexpr char ToLowerAscii(char value) {
        if (value >= 'A' && value <= 'Z')
            return static_cast<char>(value + 32);
        return value;
    }
    static constexpr bool case_insensitive_equals(std::string_view left, std::string_view right) {
        if (left.length() != right.length())
            return false;

        for (size_t i = 0; i < left.length(); ++i) {
            if (ToLowerAscii(left[i]) != ToLowerAscii(right[i]))
                return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    static constexpr int32_t case_insensitive_compare(std::string_view left, std::string_view right) {
        const size_t left_len = left.length();
        const size_t right_len = right.length();
        const size_t min_len = left_len < right_len ? left_len : right_len;

        for (size_t i = 0; i < min_len; ++i) {
            const char left_ch = ToLowerAscii(left[i]);
            const char right_ch = ToLowerAscii(right[i]);

            if (left_ch < right_ch)
                return -1;
            if (left_ch > right_ch)
                return 1;
        }

        if (left_len < right_len)
            return -1;
        if (left_len > right_len)
            return 1;
        return 0;
    }

    static constexpr std::array<std::string_view, 3> keys = {
        u8"Alpha", u8"bravo", u8"CHARLIE"
    };

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const std::string_view key) noexcept {

        size_t lo = 0;
        size_t hi = 3;
        while (lo < hi) {
            const size_t mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
            const std::string_view mid_key = keys[mid];
            const int32_t order = case_insensitive_compare(mid_key, key);

            if (order == 0)
                return true;
            if (order < 0)
                lo = mid + 1;
            else
                hi = mid;
        }

        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 3;
    static constexpr size_t min_key_length = 5;
    static constexpr size_t max_key_length = 7;
    static constexpr bool has_number = false;
    static constexpr bool has_uppercase = true;
    static constexpr bool has_lowercase = true;
    static constexpr bool has_symbol = false;
    static constexpr bool has_whitespace = false;
};
